title: Fix constraint_mode() in constructor not disabling constraints

features.name: constraint_mode(0) in constructor before randomize()
features.description: Code should include a class with a random variable and multiple constraints, where constraint_mode(0) is called in the constructor to disable one constraint before the first randomize() call
features.snippet: class c; rand int value; constraint lo_c { value < 50; } constraint hi_c { value >= 50; } function new(); hi_c.constraint_mode(0); endfunction endclass

features.name: conflicting inline constraints on rand variable
features.description: Code should include a class with two inline constraints on the same random variable that have mutually exclusive ranges, causing unsatisfiable conditions when both are active
features.snippet: class c; rand int value; constraint lo_c { value < 50; } constraint hi_c { value >= 50; } endclass

features.name: rand_mode(0) in constructor
features.description: Code should include a class with a random variable where rand_mode(0) is called in the constructor to disable randomization before the first randomize() call
features.snippet: class c; rand int value; function new(); value.rand_mode(0); endfunction endclass
